# Turning Band

**Summary**: A conditional simulation technique that reduces multi-dimensional simulations to a sum of one-dimensional ones.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1996-jarad|Jarad, 1996]] used Turning Band method to produce several realizations for $P_2O_5$ content to assess uncertainty.

## Key Results and Findings

- The method was used to provide a means to predict fluctuations in recoverable reserve characteristics. ([[1996-jarad|Jarad, 1996, p. 140]])
